z{ Search for history transactions which contain specified

z)Returns True if package is user installedr
resolveRPMTransactionItemReasonr%
TransactionItemReason_USER
TransactionItemReason_UNKNOWN)
user_installed
SwdbInterface.user_installedc
Get reason of package before transaction being undone. If package
        is already installed in the system, keep his reason.
        :param pkg: package being installed
        :param first_trans: id of first transaction being undone
        :param rollback: True if transaction is performing a rollbackr
